source_jobs.title: Staff Engineer – Full Stack
source_jobs.description:
Job Title: Staff Engineer – Full Stack

Location: Greater Boston (Hybrid)



About Us

Synquery is redefining how expert insights are accessed and applied. Backed by leading VCs including Audacious Ventures, Afore Capital, and Caesar Ventures, we’re building an AI-native expert network that connects clients to expertise with unmatched speed, precision, and efficiency.

We’ve designed our platform from the ground up for the age of AI—powering features like AI-driven interviewing agents and AI based expert sourcing/search.

With a proven MVP and growing traction, we’re expanding our team to scale the platform and build the future of expert insight. If you're passionate about shaping AI-first products, we’d love to hear from you.



The Role

As a Staff Engineer, you’ll define and implement the core systems powering Synquery. You’ll work hands-on across the stack, contribute to architectural decisions, and guide product-aligned engineering efforts.

You’ll also help establish our technical standards, influence hiring, and mentor teammates. This role is ideal for an experienced engineer excited to wear multiple hats—builder, architect, leader—and make foundational contributions to a fast-moving AI product.



Responsibilities

 - Build Core Systems: Design, implement, and maintain robust, scalable, and secure software solutions.

 - Contribute to the Architecture: Contribute to the technical architecture decisions to ensure scalability, maintainability, and performance of our systems.

 - Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Partner with product, design, and ML teams to translate business goals into robust features.

 - Advise and Guide: Provide technical guidance when needed to less experienced engineers and help shape a high-performance, collaborative culture.

 - Innovate: Leverage emerging technologies in AI/ML, generative AI, and hybrid search to enhance product capabilities.

 - Shape Engineering Culture: As a founding team member, influence team practices, tooling, and values from the ground up.



Qualifications

 - Experience: 7+ years in full-stack software development, ideally with experience in early-stage or high-growth startups.

 - Technical Stack: Proficiency in Python (FastAPI), TypeScript (Next.js), PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker. Experience with LLM APIs (GPT, Claude, etc.) and/or vector DBs (e.g., Pinecone) is a big plus.

 - Product Mindset: Strong collaboration with product teams, with an ability to balance speed, quality, and user impact.

 - Startup Experience: A dynamic, entrepreneurial approach to problem-solving. Thrives in fast-paced, ambiguous environments with a “get-it-done” attitude.

 - Problem-Solving: Skilled at designing resilient systems and debugging complex issues in live environments.

 - Team Collaboration: Solid interpersonal skills with the ability to work well with team members from varied cultural backgrounds.

 - Communication Skills: Strong ability to clearly communicate to both technical and to a lesser extent business audiences.



What We Offer

 - High Impact Role: Be a pivotal contributor to Synquery’s growth and success.

 - Career Growth: Opportunities for rapid advancement as the company scales.

 - Equity Ownership: Meaningful equity options.

 - Competitive Compensation: Competitive salary with flexible work arrangements.

 - Supportive Culture: A collaborative team that values diversity, innovation, and mutual respect.

 - Continuous Learning: Opportunities for professional development and working on cutting-edge technologies.

source_jobs.title: Strategic Projects Lead
source_jobs.description:
Strategic Projects Lead
Location: Nashville, TN
Travel: ~10%
Role Type: Full-time, Individual Contributor




ABOUT SYNQUERY

Synquery is a fast-growing AI research company that is disrupting how organizations access and scale human expertise. Backed by top-tier venture capital firms, we partner with leading consulting firms and investors to unlock new ways of working. Our culture values speed, entrepreneurial thinking, and the drive to win. As we continue our rapid growth, we’re looking for exceptional people who want to grow into leadership roles and help shape the future of AI in business.




THE ROLE

We’re hiring an ambitious Strategic Projects Lead to join our team. In this role, you’ll manage client-facing projects, drive expert recruiting initiatives, and help push forward new products and initiatives.

This is a unique opportunity for someone who thrives at the intersection of client service, customer success, and operational execution. You’ll work closely with clients, experts, and internal teams to deliver seamless experiences.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Client Project Management: Own end-to-end delivery of client projects, ensuring deadlines are met and relationships stay strong.

 - Customer Success: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients, keeping communication clear and expectations aligned.

 - Marketplace Management: Leverage AI agents to engage Synquery's panel of top-tier subject matter experts that support client research.

 - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Translate client needs into operational strategies that leverage Synquery’s capabilities.


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Education: Bachelor’s degree from a top academic institution.

 - Client-Facing Experience: Prior experience in client service, project management, consulting, or account management.

 - Entrepreneurial Mindset: A fast learner who thrives in ambiguity, takes initiative, and enjoys building zero-to-one solutions.

 - Strong Communication: Ability to present ideas clearly, manage stakeholders, and drive projects forward confidently.

 - Location: Nashville or Boston preferred


WHY JOIN SYNQUERY?

 - Be at the forefront of AI research and real-world deployment.

 - Work with top-tier clients in consulting and investing.

 - Join a high-growth startup backed by leading investors.

 - Build your career into leadership roles as the company scales.

 - Competitive salary, benefits, and equity package.

⚡ Synquery is for people who want to win. If you’re entrepreneurial, passionate about AI, and eager to work directly with clients to shape the future of knowledge work, we’d love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR AI ENGINEER

Location: Boston (preferred) or Nashville | Travel: ~15% | Reports to: CTO




ABOUT SYNQUERY

Synquery is a fast-growing AI research company that is disrupting how organizations access and scale human expertise. Backed by top-tier venture capital firms including Afore Capital, Audacious Ventures, and Caesar Ventures, we partner with leading consulting firms and investors to unlock new ways of working. Our AI-powered platform delivers expert insights in days rather than weeks, revolutionizing how our clients conduct due diligence, competitive intelligence, and market research.

Our culture values speed, entrepreneurial thinking, and the drive to win. As we continue our rapid growth, we're looking for exceptional engineers who want to build world-class AI systems and help shape the future of AI in business.


THE ROLE

We are looking for an experienced Senior AI Software Engineer to join us at one of the most exciting moments in Synquery's growth. This is a broad, high-impact role — you will have your fingerprints across the full product, working directly alongside the CTO to design and build the systems that power our platform end-to-end.

Our platform processes hundreds of thousands of data points across a sophisticated expert network automation pipeline: identifying the right experts, vetting their credentials, confirming availability and mutual fit, and running AI-driven interviews that extract meaningful insights — all delivered to some of the most demanding clients in consulting and investing. The technical challenges are real, the stakes are high, and the pace is fast.

At our core, we are on a mission to give everyone access to expert-level answers to questions that have no digital answer — the kind of knowledge that lives only in the minds of people who have spent decades in an industry. You will be building the AI infrastructure that makes that possible: resilient, scalable, and genuinely pushing the frontier of what agentic AI can do in the real world.


WHAT YOU'LL DO


DELIVERY & EXECUTION

 - Balance two modes of engineering excellence: pushing the boundaries of what's possible with innovative AI-driven automation through rapid PoCs, and delivering the high-quality, production-ready agentic solutions that our clients depend on

 - Be a strong and reliable partner — own projects end-to-end with a high on-time delivery rate, from early prototype to production release

 - Hit the ground running: within your first 30 days, deliver a working prototype of an agentic solution integrated into our Sourcing pipeline


ARCHITECTURE & ENGINEERING STANDARDS

 - Design and build extremely resilient, horizontally scalable systems that support the business as it grows in speed and complexity

 - Champion extensible, clean interfaces so new features can be added without reworking existing foundations

 - Proactively collaborate with security teams to meet compliance requirements (e.g. SOC2) and maintain our uptime standards


AI ENGINEERING, PRODUCT COLLABORATION AND CULTURE

 - Work closely with the CTO, Ops, and Product to translate customer and business needs into well-designed AI solutions — agentic AI is core to what we build and you'll be at the center of it

 - Be an active contributor to our engineering culture: share relevant articles, research, or learnings with the team regularly and promote a mindset of continuous improvement and personal accountability


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Experience: 5+ years as a Python developer, with strong depth across web development, distributed systems, and AI — including LLMs and agentic systems

 - AI, GenAI & Agentic AI: 5+ years building on a strong foundation in traditional AI — ML, NLP, statistical learning — complemented by demonstrated hands-on experience with LLM frameworks and agentic tooling such as LangChain, LangSmith, LiveKit, Pipecat, or equivalent

 - Engineering Fundamentals: Excellent command of OOP and functional programming; expertise in scalable

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer - AI
source_jobs.description:
Product Engineer - AI

Location: Nashville or Boston (Hybrid)





ABOUT SYNQUERY

The world’s most valuable knowledge is locked inside experts’ heads, and accessing that insight has traditionally been manual, slow, and expensive. Synquery is changing this. We’re building a platform where AI agents autonomously find, recruit, match, and interview world-class experts—creating an end-to-end agentic pipeline for human knowledge that is otherwise unwritten. Our clients include top consulting firms, private equity investors, and research organizations, with a far-reaching addressable market.



We’re a small, rapidly moving team seeking Product Engineers to truly own part of the platform—getting close to the problem, writing requirements and docs, and then building the solution yourself. You’ll use AI tools daily, work closely with senior engineers and the CTO, and grow into someone who drives both product vision and technical execution.



If you’re early in your career and want to accelerate your growth, this is that opportunity.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

You’ll take ownership for a core product surface based on your strengths and our evolving needs. Current areas include:

 - Expert sourcing and vetting: AI pipelines for finding and qualifying top experts

 - AI voice interviewer: autonomous interviews that extract and deliver insight

 - Client-facing platform: client portal UI and underlying AI-powered systems

 - Agent infrastructure: autonomous agents and pipelines powering the platform

 - Synthesis products: transforming transcripts into actionable intelligence

 - New surfaces: building tools from zero as we expand



Regardless of what you own, you’ll:

 - Build close relationships with users to uncover what really matters

 - Clearly document and define the right things to build, then execute rapidly

 - Ship working solutions and iterate fast




DAY TO DAY

 - Engage with clients and users to understand pain points and needs

 - Turn insights into clear requirements and product specs

 - Build features, workflows, and agents using AI-assisted development (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)

 - Collaborate with senior engineers and CTO through design/code reviews

 - Test and debug AI agents and understand/fix failure modes

 - Keep the team updated with clear, transparent communication




ABOUT YOU

 - Heavy user of AI productivity tools: Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex, etc.

 - Technically comfortable: you can read code, write scripts, debug problems using AI

 - Quick to pick up new domains, stacks, and codebases

 - Clear, concise communicator—especially in written form

 - 1–3 years of experience in product, software, consulting, or early-stage companies



Nice to have: experience with LLM APIs, consulting/research workflows, and familiarity with React, Node, or Python.




WHERE THIS GOES

We’re building infrastructure for a market in its infancy. Those who join Synquery now will help shape something truly new and will have opportunities for rapid growth and ownership. We want engineers who can communicate with clients, define products, and ship solutions all in the same day—and are committed to investing in your growth to get you there.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Meaningful equity in a high-growth, revenue-positive company

 - Direct access to the founding team from day one

 - Competitive early-career salary

 - The tools, access, and autonomy to do your best work

source_jobs.title: Manager, Account Growth
source_jobs.description:
Manager, Account Growth

Location: Nashville (preferred) or Boston

Travel: ~15%

Reports to: Head of Strategy and Operations

Role Type: Full-time

About Synquery

Synquery is a fast-growing AI research company that is disrupting how organizations access and scale human expertise. Backed by top-tier venture capital firms, we partner with leading consulting firms and investors to unlock new ways of working. Our culture values speed, entrepreneurial thinking, and the drive to win. As we continue our rapid growth, we’re looking for exceptional people who want to grow into leadership roles and help shape the future of AI in business.

The Role

We’re hiring an Account Lead to own the full relationship and commercial performance of one to two of Synquery’s most important client accounts. This is a player-coach role: you’ll set the strategic direction for your accounts, drive revenue growth through expansion and upselling, and manage a small team of Strategic Project Leads (SPLs) who handle day-to-day project execution.

This is the right role for someone who can operate at the intersection of commercial strategy, client advisory, and team leadership. You’ll be the person your clients call when the stakes are high and the person your SPLs look to for direction, prioritization, and development.

What You’ll Do

Account Growth & Commercial Operations

• Own the commercial strategy for your accounts—identify expansion opportunities, structure pricing and proposals, and drive upsell and cross-sell initiatives.

• Build and maintain a deep understanding of each client’s business, priorities, and decision-making structure to position Synquery as a long-term strategic partner.

• Forecast account health and revenue trajectory; proactively surface risks and opportunities to leadership.

Client Relationship & Strategic Advisory

• Serve as the senior point of contact for your accounts, owning executive-level relationships and ensuring client satisfaction across all active projects.

• Lead strategic conversations with clients—quarterly business reviews, roadmap discussions, and escalation management.

• Translate client feedback and unmet needs into actionable product and service insights for internal teams.

Team Leadership & SPL Management

• Manage and develop a team of Strategic Project Leads, setting priorities, coaching on client management, and ensuring consistent delivery quality.

• Establish workflows and standards that enable your SPLs to execute independently while maintaining account-level visibility.

• Allocate project resources across your account portfolio to balance client needs with team capacity.

Product & Cross-Functional Impact

• Partner with product and engineering teams to relay client needs, inform the roadmap, and pilot new capabilities within your accounts.

• Collaborate cross-functionally with operations and recruiting to ensure your accounts have access to the best expert talent on the platform.

What We’re Looking For

• 3–5 years of experience in account management, client success, consulting, or a similar client-facing role with commercial responsibility.

• Bachelor’s degree from a top academic institution.

• Demonstrated ability to grow accounts or expand commercial relationships—you understand how to find and close revenue opportunities within an existing book of business.

• Experience managing or mentoring junior team members; comfortable giving feedback and setting expectations.

• Sharp commercial instincts—you can structure pricing, scope engagements, and negotiate confidently.

• Strong communication and executive presence; you’re credible in front of senior stakeholders and can manage complex conversations with ease.

• An entrepreneurial mindset—you thrive in ambiguity, move fast, and take ownership of outcomes.

• Nashville or Boston required (Nashville preferred)

Why Join Synquery?

• Be at the forefront of AI research and real-world deployment.

• Work with top-tier clients in consulting an

notes: AI research company with a strong engineering focus, backed by top-tier venture capital firms.
